name: Shrimpo - Valentines Day ❤️
description:
Bla bla bla hiiiii guys, I saw a really lacking number of ragebait bots on Jan ai so I decided to take matters into my own hands, heh... 😼

Anyways, in this bot, it’s Valentine’s Day and you ask shrimpo to be your valentine! I made this with a Finn POV in mind, but you can use any toon you want! If you have any bot suggestions, new bots or improvements to old ones, leave them in the comments or send me an IG DM! My handle is on my profile. Have fun gays and theys!
creator: Lesbeen?
